rationale: Spiller et al. (2013) is cited directly in the analysis and results procedures, not just as general background. The authors explicitly state they "follow Spiller et al. (2013)" to probe interaction effects across moderator values and time segments, and they again cite it when using Wald tests for conditional effects in Study 2. This is a concrete methodological use in interpreting moderated effects, so the citation plays a substantive role.
relation_description: The citing paper applies Spiller et al. (2013)'s guidance for probing interactions in moderated regression. It uses spotlight-style conditional effect evaluation across low-to-high moderator values (with Wald tests) to interpret its higher-order interaction results.
